betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Ocean bee is bred from Diligent and Water in an ocean-type biome. Note that this doesn't mean literally an ocean. It is any biome that has the OCEAN tag. The stock terrain generator does not generate oceans in The Overworld, but there are a few biomes that carry the tag.

Skipping The Overworld, you might have luck trying in a Twilight Forest lake - you'll know you are in the right biome if you see Water Creepers!

You can dump the biome data in NEI by clicking on the NEI options button (the wrench), then the Tools button, then the Data Dumps button, and finally the Dump button in the biomes category. This creates a "dumps" directory in the root folder of the modpack with a biome.csv file inside of it. Try anything that has OCEAN tagged to it. You can feed these biomes into a Nature's Compass and see if there are any nearby.

Some examples: Shield, Tropics, Twilight Lake, and Lush Swamp.

If you have trouble locating an appropriate spot, you can also purchase Ocean bees from the Vending Machine. Breed them from Diligent and Water.

[note]You get more than one princess per purchase, so it's a useful way to get a few extra pristine princesses.[/note]
